label: Presidential Approval Rating
deltaNote: Peaked at 85% Feb 2025; fell to 72% Mar 2026; now 54% — lowest of presidency. Driven by crime/corruption concerns and economic anxiety.

label: Homicide Rate (per 100k)
contestNote: Q1 2026: daily intentional homicide average fell 41% vs Dec 2024 (86.9→51.4); Mar 2026 lowest since 2015. Critics note disappearances still rising; Sinaloa up 400%
delta: -41% daily avg in Q1 2026 vs Dec 2024

label: Total Homicides (2025)
contestNote: Lowest since 2016 but disappearances up 16% vs AMLO final year; six states saw homicide increases

label: GDP Growth (2025 actual / 2026 forecast)
source: Banxico quarterly report, Feb 2026; Citi Mexico Survey
contestNote: 2025 final: ~0.4% (tariff shock, investment cuts). Banxico raised 2026 forecast to 1.6% in Feb; private sector consensus 1.3–1.5%; government projects 1.8–2.8%

label: Annual Inflation
delta: +0.61pp vs Feb 2026 (4.02%); surge driven by tomatoes (+32%), airfares (+21.9%), electricity (+2.2%)

label: FDI (Jan–Sep 2025)
contestNote: Headline FDI record; critics note new greenfield investment dropped 34% to $3.17B in 2024; most is reinvestment by existing companies

label: Banxico Policy Rate
delta: -425bp from 11% peak (Aug 2024); surprise 25bp cut Mar 26 despite 4.63% inflation shock

label: Peso / USD Exchange Rate
delta: Held near 17.37 Apr 20 (slight weakening from 17.27 high Apr 17); remains near best levels since Feb 2026; USMCA Round 2 talks provide support

label: Unemployment Rate
delta: Near historic lows; slight uptick from 2.4% mid-2025

label: Pemex Total Debt
contestNote: Government spent $137B in public funds on Pemex since 2019 but reduced debt only ~$14B net; IEA projects Mexico as net oil importer by 2030

label: US Fentanyl Seizures Decline
contestNote: Experts debate cause: enforcement success vs. demand shift; cartels maintaining production capacity
